container_execution.backend_api_runtime: docker compose API image plus isolated Docker smoke containers
container_execution.frontend_runtime: host Node runtime; no frontend Dockerfile or Compose service exists
container_execution.exception_reason: Product repository defines only API/runtime Docker service; frontend tests use existing product Node toolchain and are recorded as non-container layer evidence.

frontend_container_execution.reason: No frontend Dockerfile or Compose service exists in the product repository; existing host Node toolchain was used for component tests and production build.
frontend_container_execution.expires: when frontend container runtime is introduced

frontend_coverage.reason: Focused post-closeout run captured frontend component pass/fail and production build, but did not collect Istanbul/V8 coverage for the React layer.
frontend_coverage.expires: next full regression or when frontend coverage command is standardized

omissions: No browser E2E screenshots captured because this standalone test run did not start a frontend dev server and no frontend container target exists.
